text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O didn't turn up for training
yesterday. Today, I hear a strange voice when I
enter my office.
And... that goes over there... Done!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Welcome, Trainer! I've just finished making the
conference banner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surprised, I glance at the unfurled banner by her
feet... It reads "Sakura Bakushin O's Apology
Conference."
choice_data_list: You didn't need to go that far.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No, as a class representative, I'm supposed to be
a role model. I have to take responsibility for my
mistakes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's kick off the apology conference! I
would like to offer my sincerest apologies!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I was blasting along a Bakushin-worthy straight...
and I got lost in the moment. Before I realized it,
it was already night!
choice_data_list: All right. Just be careful next time.
All right. Just be careful next time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I promise! I won't fall into temptation a second
time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
To reflect, I've decided to use this banner as my
bed sheets going forward!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I figure she has expressed her sincere regrets
rather clearly, so I stop her from going any
further.
